channel.title: friendly.atheist TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from friendly.atheist

item.title: Christian Nationalist activist Tim Barton claimed an early American preacher inspired the Declaration of Independence by using language about "inalienable rights." Just one problem: The quote Barton cited doesn't appear in the book he was holding. This i

item.title: John Dehlin, creator of the Mormon Stories podcast, has officially responded to the LDS Church's lawsuit against him. The case is shaping up as a major fight over criticism, free speech, and who gets to control the conversation about Mormonism. #Mormon #
item.description: John Dehlin, creator of the Mormon Stories podcast, has officially responded to the LDS Church's lawsuit against him. The case is shaping up as a major fight over criticism, free speech, and who gets to control the conversation about Mormonism. #Mormon #

item.title: Last year, a Tennessee Christian school punished senior Morgan Armstrong after she came out as a lesbian, banning her from graduation and threatening her future. But after Morgan fought back in court, the school has now erased her suspension, promised no
item.description: Last year, a Tennessee Christian school punished senior Morgan Armstrong after she came out as a lesbian, banning her from graduation and threatening her future. But after Morgan fought back in court, the school has now erased her suspension, promised no

item.title: Texas Justice of the Peace Dianne Hensley refused to perform same-sex weddings because of her Christian beliefs, even though she was acting as a government official. A court has now awarded her $10,000 in damages and $630,000 in legal fees. The case raise
item.description: Texas Justice of the Peace Dianne Hensley refused to perform same-sex weddings because of her Christian beliefs, even though she was acting as a government official. A court has now awarded her $10,000 in damages and $630,000 in legal fees. The case raise

item.title: Trump's "Religious Liberty Commission" just released its final report, and instead of defending religious freedom for everyone, it pushes policies that would give conservative Christianity more power in government. From attacking church-state separation

item.title: A former Catholic hospital system in Michigan is expanding reproductive health services after coming under new (secular) ownership. Procedures and treatments that were blocked for religious reasons—including tubal ligations, birth control, IUDs, and soon

item.title: Creationist Ken Ham is mad that a reporter did her job. After the Cincinnati Enquirer added context to a story about astronauts appearing at the Ark Encounter, Ham accused the paper of bias. The irony? He praised another outlet for good reporting... afte

item.title: Pastor Loran Livingston went viral after declaring America has never been a Christian nation, and the clip made him sound like a bold critic of Christian Nationalism. But the rest of the sermon tells a very different story. Here's what the clip left out

item.title: Chuck Schumer has spent more than 20 years claiming the Founding Fathers called America "God's noble experiment." But there's no evidence they ever said it. Worse, this fake quote reinforces one of Christian Nationalism's core myths—that America was foun

item.title: Want to push back against Christian Nationalism and election conspiracy theories without running for office? There's a simple solution: Become a poll worker. Elections depend on ordinary people with integrity helping voters, answering questions, and keep

item.title: Donald Trump has now made more than $1.5 million from selling his "God Bless the USA" Bible—a product marketed as a symbol of faith while generating a sizable personal profit. Watch the full video on my YouTube channel! #DonaldTrump #TrumpBible #Christia
